task:
Build this app in Clear:

**AI Ticket Categorizer** (Level 9)

Build an AI agent that categorizes support tickets. Define a Categorizer agent that returns { category, priority, suggested_action }. Tickets table stores the result. POST /api/tickets receives { subject, description } and returns the categorized ticket.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority

# Define a Categorizer agent
# POST /api/t
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Tickets table:
  subject, required
  description
  category
  priority
  suggested_action

# Define a Categorizer agent
agent 'Categorizer' receives ticket_text:
  result = ask claude 'You are a support ticket categorizer. Analyze the ticket and return a JSON object with category (bug, feature_request, or support), priority (low, medium, high), and suggested_action. Be concise.' with ticket_text returning JSON text:
    category
    priority
    suggested_action
  send back result

# POST endpoint to create a categorized ticket
when user sends ticket_data to /api/tickets:
  combined_text is ticket_data's subject
  set combined_text to (combined_text + ' ' + ticket_data's description)
  categorized = call 'Categorizer' with combined_text
  set ticket_data's category to categorized's category
  set ticket_data's priority to categorized's priority
  set ticket_data's suggested_action to categorized's suggested_action
  saved = save ticket_data to Tickets
  send back saved with status 201

# GET endpoint to list all tickets
when user calls GET /api/tickets:
  send back all Tickets
